LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH FOUNDATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS GRANTED, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE DEMURRER TO THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED FOR UNCERTAINTY (CCP 430.10(F)) AND FAILURE TO STATE FACTS THAT CONSTITUTE A CAUSE OF ACTION (CCP 430.10(E)). PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN 15 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH FOUNDATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Granted, with leave to amend from notice of entry of order. No opposition was filed. The demurrer to the entire Complaint is sustained for uncertainty (CCP 430.10(f)) and failure to state facts that constitute a cause of action (CCP 430.10(e)). Plaintiff is given 15 days leave to amend to state a cause of action against defendants. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
